name: Samiksha
text: The resume analysis, ATS scoring, and CV-based evaluation features are working well and are quite helpful. However, the AI interview experience did not work properly for me.  I used all three mock interview credits, but none of the sessions went smoothly. The main issue was that my answers were not being recorded, and as a result, each interview ended within 1–2 minutes. It seems there might be a problem with how the response tracking or recording system is functioning, as it appears to show no input being captured.
missing: The AI interview feature is not functioning properly. Whenever I provide an answer, it is not being recorded or analyzed correctly. As a result, the experience does not feel like a real interactive interview; instead, it feels like a pre-recorded session with no meaningful interaction.

name: Vansh Singla
text: The Platform itself needs major corrections which i listed above.

name: Rhythm
text: Needs better UI, smoother interview flow (less delay), and built-in role/company selection to be truly useful.
missing: I have to manually type the role, company, and job description every time, which is inconvenient. There should be dropdowns to select roles and companies, with built-in job descriptions and company-specific questions (including PYQs). This would save time, reduce effort, and also help users who aren’t sure what role they want to prepare for by giving them clear, guided options. Also, the interview experience wasn’t very smooth—the bot had delays between questions and the UI could be more user-friendly and natural. Making the interaction feel more human-like would greatly improve the overall experience.

name: Danishdeep Singh
text: I chose it because it was kind of interesting to use this AI interview platform for interview preparation. It gave real time feedback and was much better than alot of AI interview tools currently present in the market.

name: Adhya Koul
text: The product feels difficult to use in real-life scenarios and isn’t very intuitive to navigate. Many of the questions are unclear, which makes the experience confusing rather than helpful. Additionally, the pronunciation quality needs significant improvement, as it affects overall usability. The AI interview system would need substantial enhancements in clarity, usability, and speech quality for users to consider using it in their day to day lives.
missing: The questions were not extracted well, the ai interviewer was pronouncing words incorrectly so much so that it was incomprehensible for me. I had answered the questions but it did not capture that and was showing either a one lined answer or no response.

missing: Yes, the interview feature needs improvement in terms of performance and reliability. The loading speed is quite slow, and in some cases (2–3 times), the interview page did not open at all, which disrupts the user experience. Improving loading time and ensuring consistent access to the interview page would make the product much more reliable.
